response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: exists x.(GeneralPractitioner(x) & BornIn(michaelODonnell, yorkshire))
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: exists x.(BornIn(michaelODonnell, yorkshire) & SonOf(michaelODonnell, x))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: forall x.(GeneralPractitioner(x) -> (BornIn(michaelODonnell, yorkshire) & SonOf(michaelODonnell, x)))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: exists x.(GeneralPractitioner(michaelODonnell) & SonOf(yorkshire, x))
